name: playwright-qa-skills
description: A no-code QA solution: record a browser workflow and automatically produce a stable, production-ready Playwright test — with project setup, auth, review, refactoring, healing, and API blueprints.
author: playwright-qa-skills contributors

skills.name: playwright-project-init
skills.description: Scaffold a complete Playwright test project — directory structure, config, dependencies, and CI pipeline in one command.

skills.name: playwright-auth-setup
skills.description: Capture and configure authentication state via storageState so tests start already logged in.

skills.name: playwright-qa-pipeline
skills.description: One-command pipeline: record a workflow, then automatically review, refine, heal, and optionally capture API blueprints.

skills.name: playwright-recording-reviewer
skills.description: Score Playwright recordings against best practices and provide actionable feedback before refactoring.

skills.name: playwright-test-refiner
skills.description: Refactor recorded Playwright tests into Page Object Model architecture with fixtures, type-safe interfaces, data factories, and cleanup hooks.

skills.name: playwright-test-healer
skills.description: Diagnose and repair failing Playwright tests using a 6-vector RCA matrix with a 3/3 stability gate and cross-browser verification.

skills.name: playwright-har-recorder
skills.description: Capture, scrub, and parameterize Playwright network traffic into reusable, environment-agnostic API blueprints with optional mock replay.
